title: Argo Rollouts: supported deploy steps
description: The step types a flow definition/pipeline stage targeting an Argo Rollouts environment may use. Discriminated by `type`.

oneOf.title: Rolling deploy
oneOf.description: Deploys the named services to the Argo Rollouts environment using a rolling update, replacing pods incrementally within the max_surge and max_unavailable bounds.

environment.description: The environment id this step targets; join key into the top-level environments map and flow_definition.environments.

services.description: The services this step deploys. At least one is required.

name.description: Name of the service to deploy, matching a service defined for this environment.

max_surge.description: Maximum pods that may run above the desired replica count during the rollout. Defaults to "1".

max_unavailable.description: Maximum pods that may be unavailable during the rollout. Defaults to "0", so new pods surge up before old ones are retired (zero-downtime).
